span.style: color: rgb(60 , 64 , 67) ; font-family: "roboto" , "robotodraft" , "helvetica" , "arial" , sans-serif ; letter-spacing: 0.2px ; text-align: left

font.span: To find the blobs belonging to Alice, we have to look at both of the partitions. We have to do the same process to find Bob's blobs.

switch.text: Problem: To find the blobs belonging to Alice, we have to look at both of the partitions....
